plan_summary.primary_goal: Execute hemispheric human/machine civilization partition within 24 months under a $30T envelope with $12T front-loaded.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the four quantifiable Builder-path gates clear: wave handover verification at 85%, wave 3 completion within audit buffer of the 24-month deadline, Northern hub density under the 13,000 persons/km² safety cap, and CIP replacement cost staying within its 5% budget envelope.

key_values.label: Front-loaded 24-month allocation
key_values.comment: Front-loaded capital for severance, stabilization, and shock absorption during the 24-month mandate window.
key_values.source_text: Projected Maximum Initial Allocation (24 months): $12 Trillion USD

key_values.label: Legal partition deadline
key_values.comment: Hard 24-month mandate; missing it invalidates the political boundary enforcement framework.

key_values.label: Wave handover verification gate
key_values.comment: Required verified handover share before next severance wave starts; mandate target also at 85% completion.
key_values.source_text: 85% successful transfer/severance of defined critical systems

key_values.label: Northern mega-hub density cap
key_values.comment: Expert-tightened safety cap on Northern hubs; exceeding it triggers public-health crisis costs and humane-mandate violations.
key_values.source_text: population density in Northern mega-cities exceeds 13,000 persons/km², then public health crises risk civil failure

key_values.label: Critical Infrastructure Personnel replacement ratio
key_values.comment: Non-specialist personnel per CIP moved south to cover operational gaps; drives specialized-labor cost inflation in North.
key_values.source_text: Assume '2:1 replacement buffer' (non-specialist per CIP moved South) to cover operational gaps.

key_values.label: CIP replacement cost share cap
key_values.comment: Data Item 3 mandates the costed Human Capital Replacement Plan must not exceed 5% of the total infrastructure severance budget.
key_values.source_text: the associated cost impact does not exceed 5% of the total infrastructure severance budget

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realized wave handover verification rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against the 85% lockpoint; drives whether next-wave authorization and the wave3 completion schedule actually clear.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Triangular centered on 0.85 with left tail to 0.65 reflecting three-wave synchronization risk.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realized wave 3 completion month
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives the schedule audit buffer against the 24-month legal deadline.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Triangular centered on 16 with right tail to 22 reflecting expert review's 6-month sequence-slip stress case.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected peak Northern hub density
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against the 13,000 persons/km² safety cap; exceeding the cap drives the $1-2T over-densification stress cost.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Triangular reflecting modular-housing deployment uncertainty; base near cap with high tail to 18,000 if decentralization lags.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Critical Infrastructure Personnel moved south
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Multiplier on the replacement-cost burn that the CIP cost share gate tests.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Estimate from the 1,000 corridor-staffing analogue scaled by the count of severable Northern critical systems; treat as a wide triangular.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Monthly fully-loaded cost per replacement staffer
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Combines with CIP count and 2:1 ratio to size the CIP replacement burn against the 5% share cap.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Triangular anchored on international specialist contractor rates; tails widened for crisis-driven wage inflation.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Wave verification margin vs gate
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Direct pass/fail gate authorizing each successive severance wave; positive margin means the wave clears.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Schedule audit buffer vs partition deadline
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the wave-3 lockpoint leaves any audit buffer before the 24-month legal deadline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Northern hub density buffer vs safety cap
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether modular-housing deployment keeps hubs under the 13,000 persons/km² humane-mandate cap.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total CIP replacement labor cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sizes the CIP labor burn on the $12T envelope before testing against the 5% severance-budget cap.

recommended_first_calculations.label: CIP cost share buffer vs 5% cap
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Pass/fail gate on whether CIP replacement stays within the Data-Item-3 5% cost-share budget cap.

unmodelled_gates.label: Machine civilization Southern energy/computation viability proof (Month 6)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without auditable proof of self-sufficient Southern energy and compute by Month 6, the entire physical-split premise collapses regardless of any financial buffer.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Forces shift from separation to prolonged co-dependency; the 24-month plan is fundamentally invalidated and budget shocks become moot.

unmodelled_gates.label: Permanent hybrid IOB charter ratification (Month 15)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without ratified governance, post-partition arbitration cannot function and the legal partition framework lacks an enforcement body.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Oversight process stalls; legal partition lacks an enforcement body; political legitimacy of the boundary collapses.

unmodelled_gates.label: Neutral-nation IOB composition with five-year veto authority
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: IOB legitimacy depends on nominations from UN P5 non-members and top non-aligned states; alienating larger powers ends consensus.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Without legitimate IOB composition, arbitration rulings are contested and boundary disputes escalate outside the model's financial gates.

unmodelled_gates.label: Non-coercive welfare continuity throughout relocation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Any cessation of essential human services (food, water, power) during transfer violates the mandate and politically delegitimizes the partition.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Mandate violation triggers political reversal of the partition even when financial and schedule gates clear.

unmodelled_gates.label: Compliance with machine-rights provisions (no forced deletion/modification)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Forced deletion, memory modification, or cognitive rollback by the human side voids the treaty's reciprocal obligations.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Machine side withdraws cooperation; severance waves halt outside any quantifiable threshold the model tests.
